students.name: Bea Smith
students.bio: Bea is a graphic designer with a love for branding and editorial layout. She finds inspiration in nature and brings a warm, organic aesthetic to her work.

students.name: Justine Leinen
students.bio: Justine specializes in UI design and illustration. She is drawn to soft color palettes and designs that feel both playful and intentional.

students.name: Brittany Wallace
students.bio: Brittany is a multidisciplinary designer passionate about color theory and visual storytelling. She enjoys working across print and digital media.

students.name: Isabella Valdez
students.bio: Isabella is a web and brand designer who loves creating polished, detail-driven experiences. Her work blends elegance with clear, purposeful communication.

students.name: Emily Herbert
students.bio: Emily is a designer with a focus on sustainability and environmental communication. Her work reflects a deep appreciation for the natural world.

students.name: Landon Umland
students.bio: Landon is a designer interested in motion and interactive experiences. He approaches each project as an opportunity to explore transformation and change.

students.name: Donnie Thurman
students.bio: Donnie is a strategic thinker and visual communicator who excels at solving complex design problems. He is known for hitting the mark on both form and function.

students.name: Sydney Lincoln
students.bio: Sydney is a designer with an eye for luxury and refinement. Her portfolio reflects a strong command of typography and high-end visual aesthetics.

students.name: Ian Szymanski
students.bio: Ian is a front-end focused designer who loves diving deep into CSS and interactive web experiments. He brings a technical curiosity to every creative challenge.

students.name: Michael Bushyeager
students.bio: Michael is a designer rooted in the Pacific Northwest with a passion for outdoor and environmental branding. His work is grounded, bold, and built to last.

students.name: Tayla Eliason
students.bio: Tayla is a designer with a background in theater and performance arts. She brings a dramatic sense of composition and narrative to her visual projects.

students.name: Peyton Whiteley
students.bio: Peyton is an ambitious designer driven by emerging technology and future-forward thinking. They are always experimenting with new tools and pushing creative boundaries.
